result.stdout:
Usage: modernizer analyze <path-to-sln> [--out <dir>] [--redact-paths] [--strip-snippets] [--include <csv-globs>] [--exclude <csv-globs>] [--max-degree <n>] [--timeout-seconds <n>] [--max-doc-lines <n>] [--max-doc-bytes <n>] [--max-docs-per-project <n>] [--salt-hex <HEX>] [--json-only] [--report-scanned-only]

Examples:
  modernizer analyze My.sln --include "*Web*" --exclude "*Tests*"
  modernizer analyze My.sln --max-degree 4 --timeout-seconds 120
  modernizer analyze My.sln --redact-paths --salt-hex 0F0E0D...
